reasoning: The Wikipedia page 'FIDE rankings' tracks the official standard FIDE monthly rating lists. As seen from the Wikipedia text for the cutoff (which says 'ranked on 1 March 2026'), this table is strictly updated when new monthly lists are released. The March list is already out and reflects rankings as of March 1st. The next list will not be released by FIDE until April 1st. Therefore, the ranking table will remain completely unchanged between March 15, 2026, and March 22, 2026. Because Alina Kashlinskaya's ranking will be completely identical (15) on both these dates, it perfectly satisfies the 'as high or higher' (equal to) criteria for resolving to YES. Since there are essentially no scenarios where the official rank updates mid-month and drops her ranking, the probability is at the maximum permissible value.
